title: Speaking - Part 2
description: Look at the photograph and say what you can see.

tasks.instructions: Here is your photograph. It shows people climbing at a sports centre. Please tell us what you can see in the photograph.

images.label: A
images.description: Two children are climbing on an indoor climbing wall. They are wearing helmets and safety ropes while an instructor is watching from below. There are colourful handholds and sports equipment around them.

followUp.question: Talk about the people. Talk about the place. Talk about other things in the photograph.

tasks.instructions: Here is your photograph. It shows someone making a video call. Please tell us what you can see in the photograph.

images.label: B
images.description: A young woman is making a video call from her living room. She is sitting at a table and smiling at a laptop screen. There is a mug, a notebook, a plant and a sofa in the room.

followUp.question: Talk about the person. Talk about the place. Talk about other things in the photograph.
